mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.board_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.is_deleted, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, u.role, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.board_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.is_deleted, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, u.role, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{req.content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
